The source of energy, the renewable energy, is a source of energy that is always supplied by nature, and uses it to regrow at a faster rate than it can be used.
There are such problems as bird strike and changing ecosystems, and building requires consideration for living conditions and ecosystems.

The bird strike problem at a wind station, the debate on practicality, where renewable energy can get energy without releasing greenhouse gases, much of it can be used as a new source of energy, and also as a counter to global warming.
The emissions of greenhouse gases are, like the energy balance, affected by the distribution of resources, growth and technical standards.
The stability of power, the stability of renewables, wind power and solar power change unheeded, so we need a leveling tool to control the massive demand for power.
